raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The purchase of farm equipment is one of the largest capital investments farmers make.",
    "Small and underserved farmers often face challenges accessing necessary farm equipment.",
    "Cooperatively managed equipment-sharing can help increase farm viability and support sustainable agriculture practices.",
    "AB 2313 would support equipment-sharing programs that allow farmers to borrow or lease high-value equipment from regional agricultural centers.",
    "Access to equipment is a significant barrier for growers trying to implement healthy soils practices.",

    "The bill seeks to establish regional tool-sharing programs to alleviate financial burdens on farmers."
```
